channel.title: work on alexis lavail
channel.description: Recent content in work on alexis lavail

item.title: Travailler
item.description: Today it was difficult to get into the mood for efficient work. Lots of things happening, 1+ year of Covid, and a bright warm sunny day in Stockholm. My mood took me into listening to some “summer tunes”, which for me are ska/reggae/punk songs. I particularly listened to these two gems about working (travailler in French) less. Tryo - Travailler plus. Tryo is a staple of French music, particularly among (hippie) people in my generation, with some great hit songs [1, 2, 3].

item.title: Standing desk
item.description: For a few years back, I have been doing some work from home, and bought a standard IKEA manual standing desk for the home office. This was a great buy, allowing to have good ergonomy while working at home. When the Covid pandemic started, we ended up being three people working from home, and I wanted a second desk where I could be standing. I decided to buy a Standsome slim, which I got to try by chance in the public library in Karlsruhe where I stopped to work a day during a train trip.
